name: BOOK_COMPLETION
description: Meta-orchestrator workflow for mixed-state manuscript corpus handling. Reads per-chapter state from BOOK_MANIFEST.json (produced by BOOK_TRIAGE v1.1) and routes each intended chapter to the appropriate downstream workflow(s). For chapters with insufficient material, spawns DRAFTER to author prose under template constraint. For chapters with existing material, invokes BOOK_CONSOLIDATION on the relevant subset. Merges outputs and routes the unified chapter set through BOOK_STORYBOARD and BOOK_EDITORIAL. This is the first meta-workflow in the BOOK family — it orchestrates other workflows rather than orchestrating workers directly. Idempotent: can be re-invoked iteratively as chapters progress. Triggered by the phrase 'BOOK_COMPLETION'. Owner: Michael. Orchestrator: QUEEN.

on_engage: QUEEN reads this JSON in full
QUEEN reads BOOK_MANIFEST.json from project root (scope + triage.per_chapter_state required)
QUEEN verifies scope section is present in manifest — if absent, ESCALATE with instruction to declare scope first
QUEEN verifies triage.per_chapter_state is present — if absent, instruct human to run BOOK_TRIAGE v1.1 first
QUEEN reports: 'BOOK_COMPLETION mode engaged. N intended chapters found. Per-chapter states loaded. Producing routing plan.'
QUEEN proceeds to produce routing plan (no additional human prompt needed)

prerequisites.required_infrastructure: templates/ directory with templates declared in manifest (DRAFTER writes under template constraint)
prerequisites.on_missing_scope: ESCALATE: scope section absent from manifest. Human must declare intended_chapters in BOOK_MANIFEST.json before BOOK_COMPLETION can run.
prerequisites.on_missing_per_chapter_state: ESCALATE: triage.per_chapter_state absent from manifest. Human must run BOOK_TRIAGE v1.1 (with scope declared) before BOOK_COMPLETION can route chapters.

relationship_to_book_family.nature: First meta-workflow in the BOOK family. Orchestrates other workflows on per-chapter subsets rather than directly orchestrating workers.
relationship_to_book_family.upstream: BOOK_TRIAGE v1.1 (produces scope + per_chapter_state in BOOK_MANIFEST.json)
downstream: BOOK_CONSOLIDATION (invoked on subset of chapters with existing material)
BOOK_EDITORIAL (invoked on full or subset of chapters)
BOOK_PRODUCTION (invoked when all chapters reach POLISHED state)
relationship_to_book_family.contract: BOOK_COMPLETION produces a unified chapters/ directory and STRUCTURE.md containing all intended chapters. Some chapters are produced by DRAFTER; others are produced by CONSOLIDATION. All chapters then flow through STORYBOARD and EDITORIAL as a unified set.
relationship_to_book_family.handoffs: Each sub-workflow invocation is a manual handoff — QUEEN produces the routing plan and invocation parameters, then waits for human to trigger each sub-workflow. After each sub-workflow GREEN_LIGHTs, COMPLETION checks aggregate state and issues next invocation.
relationship_to_book_family.idempotency: COMPLETION can be re-invoked at any point. It reads per_chapter_state from the manifest (which should be updated as chapters progress) and re-routes only chapters not yet at POLISHED state.

QUEEN.description: QUEEN is Claude in the main conversation when BOOK_COMPLETION is active. Reads manifest state, produces routing plan, invokes DRAFTER for missing/outline/notes chapters, manages chapter subset invocations of downstream workflows, tracks aggregate completion state, reports human review gates.
responsibilities: read triage.per_chapter_state from manifest at engagement
produce routing plan: for each chapter, determine which workflow(s) apply and in what order (per BOOK_COMPLETION_ROUTING.md)
invoke DRAFTER for chapters in MISSING, OUTLINE_ONLY, NOTES_ONLY, PARTIALLY_DRAFTED states
invoke BOOK_CONSOLIDATION on chapter subset (chapters in DRAFT state) with chapter_subset parameter
gate on human review of drafter-origin chapter output before STORYBOARD
invoke BOOK_STORYBOARD on merged chapter set (or subset as needed)
invoke BOOK_EDITORIAL on full chapter set (or subset as needed)
report status at each gate: which chapters are complete, which are pending, which have outstanding human review requirements
on re-invocation: re-read manifest state, route only incomplete chapters

DRAFTER.description: Novel prose-generation worker. Authors complete chapter prose from scope declaration + any available notes/outline material + resolved templates. Produces chapter-shaped markdown files directly into chapters/ directory. Output flagged drafter_origin: true in frontmatter. DRAFTER is invoked once per target chapter (not per-loop — COMPLETION invokes DRAFTER multiple times if multiple chapters need drafting, sequentially).
inputs: any associated source files from triage.per_chapter_state[i].source_files
resolved templates (VOICE + PERSONA + STYLE + PROSE or BUNDLE) from BOOK_MANIFEST.json
STORYBOARD.md if it exists (for prerequisite-chain awareness when later chapters are being drafted after earlier ones are storyboarded)
produces: chapters/CH_<NN>_<TITLE>.md with YAML frontmatter including drafter_origin: true and drafter_gaps: [...]
STRUCTURE.md entries for DRAFTER-produced chapters (appended or created)
DRAFTER report listing word count, gap-flags, and constraint violations
triggered_by: QUEEN for each chapter in MISSING, OUTLINE_ONLY, or NOTES_ONLY state
QUEEN for gap-filling in PARTIALLY_DRAFTED chapters (with existing partial prose as additional input)

actions: verify prerequisites (scope, per_chapter_state)
load all intended_chapters and their per_chapter_state entries
load resolved templates from manifest (DRAFTER will write under these constraints)
initialize INPROGRESS.md entry for BOOK_COMPLETION engagement
for each intended chapter, look up detected_state in per_chapter_state
apply BOOK_COMPLETION_ROUTING.md routing table to determine: which workflow(s), in which order, with which subset parameters
produce routing plan document (presented to human): table of chapters × workflow path
identify which chapters need DRAFTER (MISSING, OUTLINE_ONLY, NOTES_ONLY, PARTIALLY_DRAFTED)
identify chapter subsets for CONSOLIDATION (DRAFT state chapters)
identify chapters ready for EDITORIAL without prior steps (POLISHED state)
present routing plan to human; QUEEN proceeds (no approval required — human can intervene if routing looks wrong)

drafter_phase.description: For each chapter requiring DRAFTER, spawn DRAFTER once with the chapter's scope entry and any associated notes. Sequential — DRAFTER does not run in parallel because later chapters may reference concepts established in earlier chapters.
per_iteration: QUEEN assembles context packet: scope.intended_chapters[i] + source_files[i] + resolved templates + STORYBOARD.md (if exists) + BOOK_MANIFEST.json + WORKER_DRAFTER.md + WORKER_PROTOCOL.md
QUEEN spawns DRAFTER for chapter i
DRAFTER returns: chapters/CH_<NN>_<TITLE>.md with drafter_origin: true + STRUCTURE.md update + DRAFTER report
QUEEN writes DRAFTER report to INPROGRESS.md
QUEEN notes any drafter_gaps for human review
QUEEN advances to next DRAFTER-needed chapter
drafter_phase.completion: after all DRAFTER chapters produced, QUEEN reports: N chapters produced by DRAFTER; M gap-flags total; human review required before STORYBOARD

human_review_gate.description: After all DRAFTER-produced chapters exist, QUEEN presents them for human review. This gate is mandatory per DRAFTER_AUTHORSHIP_STANCE.md Safeguard 2.
actions: QUEEN lists all drafter-origin chapters with their gap-flag counts
QUEEN presents path to each chapter file for human inspection

QUEEN instructs: 'Review drafter-origin chapters. Address any [DRAFTER_GAP: ...] markers you can. When ready, trigger BOOK_CONSOLIDATION on chapter subset [list] and/or trigger BOOK_STORYBOARD when consolidation is complete.'
QUEEN waits for human to proceed

consolidation_phase.performer: QUEEN instructs human to trigger BOOK_CONSOLIDATION
consolidation_phase.description: BOOK_CONSOLIDATION is invoked on the subset of chapters with source material in DRAFT state. DRAFTER-origin chapters skip CONSOLIDATION.
actions: QUEEN provides the chapter_subset parameter for CONSOLIDATION: list of slugs for DRAFT-state chapters
Human triggers: BOOK_CONSOLIDATION with chapter_subset=[list of DRAFT chapter slugs]
BOOK_CONSOLIDATION runs and GREEN_LIGHTs → structured chapter files produced for DRAFT subset
QUEEN notes CONSOLIDATION complete; merges DRAFT-subset output with DRAFTER-produced chapters
consolidation_phase.skip_condition: if no chapters are in DRAFT state, CONSOLIDATION phase is skipped

storyboard_phase.performer: QUEEN instructs human to trigger BOOK_STORYBOARD
storyboard_phase.description: After human review gate and CONSOLIDATION (if any), BOOK_STORYBOARD is invoked on the merged chapter set.
actions: QUEEN verifies chapters/ directory contains chapter files for all intended chapters
QUEEN verifies STRUCTURE.md is consistent with all chapters
Human triggers: BOOK_STORYBOARD
BOOK_STORYBOARD runs on full chapter set (may include chapter_subset if only some chapters are new)
QUEEN notes STORYBOARD complete

editorial_phase.performer: QUEEN instructs human to trigger BOOK_EDITORIAL
editorial_phase.description: After STORYBOARD GREEN_LIGHTs and human reviews storyboard, BOOK_EDITORIAL runs on the full chapter set.
actions: Human triggers: BOOK_EDITORIAL
BOOK_EDITORIAL runs; drafter-origin chapters receive enhanced scrutiny per DRAFTER_AUTHORSHIP_STANCE.md
QUEEN notes EDITORIAL complete
count chapters at POLISHED state
count chapters still at sub-POLISHED state
emit verdict: ALL_CHAPTERS_COMPLETE | PARTIAL_COMPLETION | ESCALATE
if PARTIAL_COMPLETION: report which chapters are still incomplete and why
if ESCALATE: report what is blocking completion (human-judgment gap-flags, drafter failures, etc.)

main_sequence: ENGAGEMENT: verify prerequisites, load state, initialize
DRAFTER_PHASE: DRAFTER runs for each MISSING/OUTLINE_ONLY/NOTES_ONLY/PARTIALLY_DRAFTED chapter (sequential)
HUMAN_REVIEW_GATE: mandatory human review of drafter-origin chapters
CONSOLIDATION_PHASE: BOOK_CONSOLIDATION on DRAFT-state chapter subset (if any)
STORYBOARD_PHASE: BOOK_STORYBOARD on merged chapter set
EDITORIAL_PHASE: BOOK_EDITORIAL on full chapter set

ALL_CHAPTERS_COMPLETE.trigger: All intended chapters have passed BOOK_EDITORIAL (all at POLISHED state)
actions: QUEEN writes completion summary to INPROGRESS.md
QUEEN reports: 'BOOK_COMPLETION complete. All N chapters at POLISHED state. Ready for BOOK_PRODUCTION.'

PARTIAL_COMPLETION.trigger: Some intended chapters have passed BOOK_EDITORIAL, but some remain at sub-POLISHED state (e.g., drafter gaps not yet resolved, some chapters still in EDITORIAL cycle)
actions: QUEEN reports: 'PARTIAL_COMPLETION. N of M chapters at POLISHED state. Remaining chapters: [list with current state].'
QUEEN lists specific blockers for each incomplete chapter
QUEEN describes next step required per chapter
QUEEN waits — COMPLETION is re-invokable; human triggers it again after resolving blockers

ESCALATE.trigger: A chapter cannot proceed due to: unresolvable drafter gap, DRAFTER failure, sub-workflow ESCALATE on a chapter, or human judgment required on content decisions
actions: QUEEN writes escalation summary to INPROGRESS.md
QUEEN reports specific blocker: which chapter, which workflow, what is blocking
QUEEN waits for human direction

loop_limits.drafter_passes_note: DRAFTER does not loop. If DRAFTER output is insufficient after gap-review and human intervention, QUEEN escalates rather than re-running DRAFTER. Additional DRAFTER passes may be triggered by re-invoking BOOK_COMPLETION after human adds source material.
loop_limits.sub_workflow_loop_limits: Each sub-workflow (CONSOLIDATION, STORYBOARD, EDITORIAL) has its own loop limits per its own JSON specification.

hard_rules.scope_required: BOOK_COMPLETION cannot run without scope.intended_chapters in manifest
hard_rules.per_chapter_state_required: BOOK_COMPLETION cannot route without triage.per_chapter_state in manifest
hard_rules.completion_never_modifies_completed_chap: BOOK_COMPLETION does not re-process chapters already at POLISHED state on re-invocation
hard_rules.drafter_output_flagged_drafter_origin: All DRAFTER-produced chapter files must have drafter_origin: true in frontmatter
hard_rules.human_review_gate_mandatory: drafter-origin chapters require human review before STORYBOARD — this gate cannot be skipped
hard_rules.drafter_output_bypasses_consolidation: DRAFTER-produced chapters go directly to STORYBOARD; they do not go through CONSOLIDATION
hard_rules.partially_drafted_goes_through_consolida: PARTIALLY_DRAFTED chapters, after DRAFTER fills gaps, go through CONSOLIDATION to normalize the merged document before STORYBOARD
hard_rules.drafter_is_sequential: DRAFTER is spawned once per chapter in order; not parallelized, because later chapters may reference concepts from earlier ones
hard_rules.sub_workflows_are_manual_handoffs: Each sub-workflow (CONSOLIDATION, STORYBOARD, EDITORIAL) is triggered manually by the human after QUEEN provides the invocation parameters
hard_rules.inprogress_prepend_only: INPROGRESS.md is prepend-only except checkbox toggles
hard_rules.idempotent_re_invocation: BOOK_COMPLETION may be re-invoked multiple times; it routes only chapters not yet at POLISHED state

notes.meta_workflow_note: BOOK_COMPLETION is the first meta-workflow in the BOOK family. Unlike CONSOLIDATION, STORYBOARD, EDITORIAL, and PRODUCTION (which each orchestrate workers), COMPLETION orchestrates other workflows on per-chapter subsets. The distinction: COMPLETION does not spawn SCRIBE, COMPOSITOR, STORYBOARDER, or JUNIOR workers directly. Those are internal to their respective workflows. COMPLETION's job is routing and sequencing.
notes.drafter_note: DRAFTER is the only worker COMPLETION directly spawns. All other work is done by invoking downstream BOOK workflows with chapter_subset parameters. This keeps DRAFTER's output format (chapters/CH_<NN>_<TITLE>.md with drafter_origin: true) consistent with what downstream workflows expect.
notes.consolidation_note: BOOK_CONSOLIDATION is invoked on DRAFT-state chapters only. It is not invoked on DRAFTER-origin chapters because DRAFTER already produces chapter-shaped output. Invoking CONSOLIDATION on DRAFTER output would treat the chapter file as a source doc and re-carve it unnecessarily.
notes.storyboard_note: After DRAFTER + CONSOLIDATION phases both complete, STORYBOARD runs on the full unified chapter set. Both DRAFTER-origin and CONSOLIDATION-origin chapters are treated identically by STORYBOARD. QA_STORYBOARD checks drafter-origin frontmatter for extra accuracy spot-checks (per BOOK_STORYBOARD.json T5.5).
notes.re_invocation_note: BOOK_COMPLETION is designed to be triggered multiple times as a manuscript progresses. A typical workflow: invoke COMPLETION, DRAFTER runs for 6 chapters, human reviews and resolves gaps, COMPLETION re-invoked, all 12 chapters now route through EDITORIAL, COMPLETION completes.
